n_total.description: Total number of identical active power supplies in the system.

n_min.description: Minimum number of power supplies required for the system to function.

lambda_a.description: Constant failure rate per hour of each power supply when all 20 are operating.

lambda_b.description: Failure rate per hour of each remaining power supply when one power supply has already failed (λ_a ≤ λ_b).

mu.description: Constant repair rate per hour for a failed power supply.
